Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course, offered by the Psychology department, teaches research methods crucial for advancing psychological science, which indirectly contributes to promoting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: The course is a graduate-level program, directly contributing to quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing advanced research and statistical skills (Target 4.4) essential for employment.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course teaches R language, a free open-source tool, promoting knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) and building capacity for data analysis, which is vital for reliable data (Target 17.18).
